title: OverCR Source Record v2.4.0
description: Canonical schema for a registered source in the OverCR knowledge subsystem. Sources are immutable once registered; staleness is a status flag, never a deletion.

source_id.description: Unique identifier. Format: 'src-' + 8-char hex suffix. Immutable.

origin.description: Where this source came from: URL, file path, operator upload, citation, etc.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the source record was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last modification to the record (not the source content).

trust_level.description: Trust tier for this source. Never auto-escalated. Operator must explicitly change.

ingestion_path.description: Ordered list of transformation steps applied to this source (ingest, normalize, classify, etc.)

transformation_chain.description: Full audit trail of transformations applied to this source.

canonical_refs.description: Stable, canonical references for this source (DOI, permalink, stable URL, file hash).

workflow_usage.description: Workflow run_ids that referenced this source.

citation_count.description: Number of times this source has been cited in research packets.

project_scope.description: Which OverCR project or workload this source belongs to.

status.description: Current status. Stale/archived sources remain queryable — never deleted.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of source content at time of ingestion. Used for integrity verification.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of the source content.

content_path.description: Filesystem path to stored content (relative to knowledge/documents/).
